address.streetAddress: Hissa 2/1A Survey, No. 53, 54 & 58, Fountain Road, Tulaja Bhawani Nagar, Kharadi, Pune, Maharashtra 411014, India

itemListElement.reviewBody:
If there would be an option of 0 star,would have given it
Worst school on the planet Earth
Education wise it’s a big zero and from the management part it’s pathetic,it’s not an educational institution it’s just a money mining institution
School is only and only interested in money money money
No respect for parents , at the time of leaving the school they set meetings with the president and than Mr.president asks for the whole years fees when the student has just studied for two months and that too with full attitude and threatening way
They literally threatens the parents and don’t provide the leaving certificate even when whole quarter’s fees been paid
They disrespect parents like their slaves

Keep a child at home is better than Keeping a child in this money mining institution

By enrolling in this institution, Parents think thousands of times before keeping children’s future on stake and parents respect and dignity on stake.

itemReviewed.name: Victorious Kidss Educares - Tulaja Bhawani Nagar,Kharadi

itemListElement.reviewBody: Worst school in India and so called International.There is nothing international about it . Teachers are worse than govt school teacher. No focus on academics they only play politics with parents and kids. So called president is only interested in money, he has no clue about whats going in school. If u go for admission cancellation then they show u there real side.

itemReviewed.name: Victorious Kidss Educares - Tulaja Bhawani Nagar,Kharadi

itemListElement.reviewBody:
BEST SCHOOL for our little ones.
My son is in Nursery,and my experience with school is really gud.They take care of kids very well.
Sandhya mam,,thank you so much for your sincere attention, love and care for my son.
Their Annual Day was a boom..well planned and executed..All enjoyed a lot.

itemReviewed.name: Victorious Kidss Educares - Tulaja Bhawani Nagar,Kharadi

itemListElement.reviewBody: VKE is a great school for the foreigners as well as Indians! The school staff does not discriminate between students and treat everyone very well.... They way of teaching of the teachers is so interesting and compared to other school's students (CBSE board especially), students in this school are very much intelligent and mannered because they teach you how to behave as well... This is really helpful and the school is very well organised and polite to students, teachers and parents as well.. I would highly recommend this school to you!!!

itemReviewed.name: Victorious Kidss Educares - Tulaja Bhawani Nagar,Kharadi

itemListElement.reviewBody:
This is one of the best school which has good reputation and is know for its well educated teaching staff.
This school is a great competitor of kothari school.
Teaches has always eye on each and every child in the class and they share frequent feedback with parents to make child better.
This school has quality education with good infrastructure.
This school makes their way to be one of the best school in pune.
